decision.reason: The dependency chain closes inside the repository C/V/X model. Standard global P != NP still requires an external formal identification of P_CVX with standard polynomial-time Turing computation.

definitions.E_phi: The parameterized assignment-bearing e33 target family produced from DIMACS CNF inputs.
definitions.NP_CVX: Certificate-bearing computations over the encoded E(phi) family with public witness checking and inverse assignment projection.
definitions.P_CVX: Polynomial-time public computations whose executions compile with polynomial overhead into the certified public C/V/X trace model and do not use X extractor/oracle/advice events.

next_highest_yield_item.action: Formalize P_CVX and standard P in a proof assistant, then prove or refute their extensional equivalence.

non_claims: This is not a peer-reviewed or proof-assistant-checked Clay theorem proof.
This does not assert the blocked literal equivalence P != NP iff T985.
This does not allow X extractor/oracle/advice access inside public P.
This does not use the finite 2048-mask candidate as a SAT-preserving reduction.

full_no_escape_ledger_closed.needed: A dependency ledger linking the reduction, trace, no-escape, V, and X policy obligations with no blockers.

decision.reason: The repo has a replayed T985-backed route to the model-scoped separation claim, but no formal hProp definitions and no backward map from P != NP to T985Certified.

literal_t985_iff_not_used.needed: The theorem extraction must not rely on the blocked literal P != NP iff T985 equivalence.

public_polynomial_trace_model.needed: A polynomial-overhead public trace compiler and total C/V/X typing for accepted public executions.

pure_c_no_escape.needed: A replayed theorem that pure C traces cannot recover the hidden obstruction.

decision.reason: The certified projection has a 297-dimensional quotient, a retained 44,224-dimensional kernel, a chosen section, and certified kernel-obstructed operations. This supports the rolewise reflection, not a public inverse or a standalone global separation theorem.

quotient_kernel_noncollapse_reflection.needed: A certified structural witness that public quotient access is not hidden kernel recovery.

frontier_decision.reason: The repo has a representative hidden e33 packet, public C/V/X policy, and a public finite CNF-to-D20-mask compiler candidate. The finite candidate fails SAT preservation and is fenced as lookup-only. The assignment-bearing parameterized E(phi) family has a public compiler, no hidden advice reads, and a certified forall yes/no preservation theorem.

sat_complete_encoded_family.needed: A public polynomial reduction from DIMACS CNF-SAT to the encoded E(phi) family with yes/no preservation.

v_is_public_boundary_not_hidden_advice.needed: V events must be visible, replayable boundary crossings rather than hidden extractor access.

decision.reason: The explicit sector-33 extractor exists at family scope, but the formal policy keeps it on the X surface. Public-P executions compile to C-only traces; V is public-certificate surface; X is oracle/advice/extractor surface.

x_excluded_from_public_p.needed: X access must remain typed as extractor/oracle/advice surface, not public-P computation.

proof_chain.claim: DIMACS CNF-SAT reduces publicly and polynomially to the E(phi) encoded family with forall yes/no preservation.
Accepted public polynomial executions compile to the C/V/X trace vocabulary with polynomial overhead.
Accepted trace events are C, V, X, or explicit residues; no untyped escape is silently accepted.
Pure public C traces do not recover the hidden e33 obstruction needed to decide the family.
Visible V wall crossings are public boundary certificates, not hidden advice.
Successful hidden-sector extraction is typed X and excluded from public-P computation.
A public polynomial decider would need either an impossible pure-C recovery or an X extractor outside public P.

quotient_kernel_reflection.role: The 297-dimensional public quotient and 44,224-dimensional retained kernel certify the surface/fiber non-collapse pattern used as structural support.

t985_boundary.role: T985 suffices for the repo-local separation chain, while the blocked backward map prevents replacing the theorem by a literal P != NP iff T985 slogan.

theorem.conditional_standard_form: If the repository C/V/X public trace model is proved extensionally equivalent to the standard Turing-machine definition of polynomial-time public computation, then this model-scoped theorem promotes to the standard statement P != NP.
theorem.name: C/V/X Model P != NP Separation
theorem.statement: In the repository C/V/X public computation model, no public polynomial-time C-only computation decides the SAT-complete parameterized E(phi) family. Equivalently, P_CVX != NP_CVX for this encoded family under the certified C/V/X interface.
